items.title: Three AIADMK MLAs resign from posts in Tamil Nadu, join TVK
items.summary: Assembly Speaker J.C.D. Prabhakar accepts their resignations. AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K. Palaniswami and AMMK founder T.T.V. Dhinakaran accuse TVK of horse trading.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Top Iranian Negotiators Arrive in Qatar for Talks on Peace Deal
items.summary: President Trump gave conflicting signals over how much progress had been made in the talks. Both the United States and Iran suggested that a breakthrough was not imminent.

items.title: Thai rescuers join effort to free seven people trapped in Laos cave
items.summary: Seven have been stuck in flooded cave in central Laos for five days after heavy rain caused landslides Divers who helped in the dramatic rescue of a young Thai football team in...
